chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.80 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case --------------------------------------------- 27.01.2026 Mr. Gul Muhammad, advocate for applicant Mr. Shoaib Safdar, A.P.G. Chaudhry Khalid Rahim, advocate for respondent No.1 ------------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal revision application and seeks direction for early disposal of the case. Learned counsel for respondent No.1 and learned A.P.G. have recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed, however, with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of two months, under intimation to this Court through learned MIT-II. However, it is made clear that no adjournment on any flimsy grounds would be granted to either party during trial. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
